data.content: Fixed beat detail dialog width. Root cause: DialogContent base class includes sm:max-w-lg (512px) which silently overrode the unprefixed max-w-[1600px] because tailwind-merge treats them as separate utilities. Fix: added sm:max-w-[1600px] to explicitly override at the sm: breakpoint. All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, 144 test files). Branch: worktree-foolery-bcc2-dialog-width
